query: Spotify vs Apple Music audio quality

text_blocks.answer: Apple Music significantly outperforms Spotify in sound quality by offering CD-quality and Hi-Res Lossless audio (up to 24-bit/192 kHz) at no extra cost. Spotify Premium maxes out at lossy 320 kbps using Ogg Vorbis compression. Apple Music also includes immersive Dolby Atmos Spatial Audio.
Apple Music heavily features Dolby Atmos, creating an immersive surround-sound experience for compatible tracks

To hear the difference between the two, you need the right equipment. Lossless audio provides better dynamic range, but casual listeners using Bluetooth headphones (which compress audio) will struggle to tell the difference. To experience Apple Music's Hi-Res files, you will need wired headphones and a dedicated DAC (Digital-to-Analog Converter).

text_blocks.snippet: Apple Music significantly outperforms Spotify in sound quality by offering CD-quality and Hi-Res Lossless audio (up to 24-bit/192 kHz) at no extra cost. Spotify Premium maxes out at lossy 320 kbps using Ogg Vorbis compression. Apple Music also includes immersive Dolby Atmos Spatial Audio.
snippet_highlighted_words: Apple Music significantly outperforms Spotify in sound quality

list.snippet: Apple Music: Streams in ALAC (Apple Lossless Audio Codec), offering bit-perfect copies of the studio master up to 24-bit/192 kHz.
Spotify: Uses Ogg Vorbis format maxing out at 320 kbps. While Spotify has announced a Lossless tier (up to 24-bit/44.1 kHz), Apple currently offers a wider array of Hi-Res options.

text_blocks.snippet: Apple Music heavily features Dolby Atmos, creating an immersive surround-sound experience for compatible tracks. Spotify does not support Spatial Audio or Dolby Atmos mixes. YouTube·Jimmy Tries World +2

To hear the difference between the two, you need the right equipment. Lossless audio provides better dynamic range, but casual listeners using Bluetooth headphones (which compress audio) will struggle to tell the difference. To experience Apple Music's Hi-Res files, you will need wired headphones and a dedicated DAC (Digital-to-Analog Converter).

extracted.summary:
`Apple Music significantly outperforms Spotify in sound quality` by offering CD-quality and Hi-Res Lossless audio (up to 24-bit/192 kHz) at no extra cost. Spotify Premium maxes out at lossy 320 kbps using Ogg Vorbis compression. Apple Music also includes immersive Dolby Atmos Spatial Audio.[](https://medium.com/@iamtimbaker/spotify-vs-apple-music-which-is-better-7b1aecb23039) [[1]](https://medium.com/@iamtimbaker/spotify-vs-apple-music-which-is-better-7b1aecb23039)[[2]](https://www.whathifi.com/features/apple-music-vs-spotify-which-better)[[3]](https://www.theindianaudiophileforum.com/c/ask-the-community/sound-quality-spotify-vs-apple-music)

Format and Resolution

- **Apple Music:** Streams in ALAC (Apple Lossless Audio Codec), offering bit-perfect copies of the studio master up to 24-bit/192 kHz.
- **Spotify:** Uses Ogg Vorbis format maxing out at 320 kbps. While Spotify has announced a Lossless tier (up to 24-bit/44.1 kHz), Apple currently offers a wider array of Hi-Res options.[](https://www.moon-audio.com/blogs/expert-advice/apple-music-vs-spotify-sound-quality) [[1]](https://www.moon-audio.com/blogs/expert-advice/apple-music-vs-spotify-sound-quality)[[2]](https://www.whathifi.com/features/apple-music-vs-spotify-which-better)[[3]](https://www.theindianaudiophileforum.com/c/ask-the-community/sound-quality-spotify-vs-apple-music)[[4]](https://musicfab.dvdfab.cn/general/apple-music-vs-spotify-sound-quality.htm)

Spatial Audio

Apple Music heavily features **Dolby Atmos** , creating an immersive surround-sound experience for compatible tracks . Spotify does not support Spatial Audio or Dolby Atmos mixes.[](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JPXgCGaqreA&t=144) [[1]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JPXgCGaqreA&t=144)[[2]](https://www.theindianaudiophileforum.com/c/ask-the-community/sound-quality-spotify-vs-apple-music)[[3]](https://www.whathifi.com/features/apple-music-vs-spotify-which-better)

Hardware Limitations To hear the difference between the two, you need the right equipment. Lossless audio provides better dynamic range, but casual listeners using Bluetooth headphones (which compress audio) will struggle to tell the difference. To experience Apple Music's Hi-Res files, you will need wired headphones and a dedicated DAC (Digital-to-Analog Converter).[](https://www.moon-audio.com/blogs/expert-advice/apple-music-vs-spotify-sound-quality) [[1]](https://www.moon-audio.com/blogs/expert-advice/apple-music-vs-spotify-sound-quality)[[2]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-xMxKuI5x-4&t=459)[[3]](https://www.pocket-lint.com/review-spotify-lossless-audio-option/)[[4]](https://www.theindianaudiophileforum.com/c/ask-the-community/sound-quality-spotify-vs-apple-music)[[5]](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/UEfzClzSLUU)
